characters.name: Bubu
characters.description: Bubuis a minor character from Ni Hao Kai-lan. He is one of the main construction worker ants. "I got it! I got it! It’s really really true! I got it! I got it! I know just what to do! Everyone feels happy when they get a choice." "I don’t want to wear stripes or swirls or sparkles. Ah! Nowthisone I like. I choose the polka dot costume, so that means we’reallgoing to wear polka dots."

characters.name: Fox Guards
characters.description: The Fox Guards are characters in the season 2 episode,Princess Kai-Lan. They're in charge of guarding theFox King's Castle. One of the guards is Xin Xin's father.

characters.name: Fox King
characters.description: Fox KingGenderMaleSpeciesFoxFirst AppearancePrincess Kai-LanActorJames Sie  The Fox King ("狐王") is a red fox in The Fox Kingdom. He creates magic bamboo forests to keep the bears away. He usually gets mad, and he couldn't stand up, because of the dancing bears. But, he tells TheBear Queenwhat is making him mad, then he be friends with her.

characters.description: HohoGenderMaleAge3SpeciesMonkeyActorAngie Wu(US)Ruby Xing Xing Evans (UK)LikesBananas, dumplings, jumping, hugsDislikesProblems, lies, time out This are the quote of all Characters From Ni Hao Kai Lan. Hoho(Chinese: 霍霍), alternatively spelledHoHoon the title of each episode, is one of the main characters in theNickelodeonanimated seriesNi Hao, Kai-Lan. He is voiced by Angie Wu. He is an albino monkey and one of Kai-Lan's animal friends who get introduced on the premiere episodeDragonboat Festival.

characters.name: Kai-Lan
characters.description: Kai-Lan Chow"You make my heart feel super happy!"Other NamesKaren         ( Mostly Kelland )RelativesYe-Ye(paternal grandfather)Gu Nai Nai(paternal grandaunt)Unknown MotherUnknown FatherSpeciesHumanAge6GenderFemaleLikesHer FriendsDislikesSomething going wrongEye colorBrownFirst appearanceDownward Doghouse(Kai-Lan's First Lantern Festival)Latest appearanceJourney to Monkey King CastleVoiced byBridgette Ho (Downward Doghouse; 2004)[1]Jade Lianna-Peters(2008-2012)Emily Yong(UK) (2009-2010)Unknown Actor (Ni Hao, Kai-Lan: Dot to Dot; 2021) This are the quote of all Characters From Ni Hao Kai Lan. Kai-Lan(Chinese:凯兰Kǎi lán/Kelland) is the main title character ofNi Hao, Kai-Lan. She is voiced by Chinese-American actressJade Lianna-Peters. During the show, she and her friends have to solve problems that come up during their daily life. Kai-Lan is shown to have an energetic and childlike personality. This is mainly shown through the innocent nature of her voice. She is also shown to be rather clumsy, especially with knocking down stuff on accident. She is also tomboyish, as she seems to be into dinosaurs and pirates. In contrast, she is very caring and helping.

characters.name: Lulu
characters.description: LuluWith BalloonWithout BalloonGenderFemaleAge6StatusAliveSpeciesRhinoFirst AppearanceDragonboat FestivalActorBeverly Duan(US)Lauren Reichwald (UK) Luluis a supporting character inNi Hao, Kai-Lan. She is voiced by Beverly Duan. She is one of Kai-Lan's animal friends. Lulu is a bright bubblegum pink rhino who has a red balloon tied to her nose that helps her fly in the sky. Her best friend isKai-Lan. When her friends are in trouble, Lulu is the one in the group who stays calm, remains positive, and thinks of a solution to the problem. Lulu is always seen as being there to help her friends. Lulu plays the piano in Kai-Lan's music group. Her favorite fruit is the lychee. She likes balloons, tea parties, dancing, playing house, and dressing up like a fairy and more. She is very nice, energetic, and sweet.

characters.name: Monkey King
characters.description: The Monkey KingGenderMaleSpeciesMonkeyFirst AppearancePrincess Kai-LanActorJack Cygan TheMonkey King（simplified Chinese: 孙悟空 traditional Chinese:孫悟空") was created in 2009, is a minor character ofNi Hao, Kai-Lan. He is voiced byJack Cygan. He is first mentioned in "Ni Hao, Halloween", whereHohodresses up as him, and then in "Kai-Lan's Big Play", where they do a play about him. He then makes his first appearance in "Princess Kai-Lan" and "Journey to Monkey King Castle", the two last episodes of the series. The Monkey King isKai-Lanand friends' favorite superhero. He has a magic stick which goes "shoom" to make magic stuff happen. The Monkey King has a transformation suit that enable him to shift into anything he can think of. Besides his magic stick, he also wears magic red shoes which allows him jump very high.

characters.name: Mr. Dragon
characters.description: Mr. DragonSpeciesDragonFirst AppearanceDragonboat FestivalActorFrank Welker  Mr. Dragonis a large dragon, and is a character appearing in several episodes ofNi Hao, Kai-Lan. He is first mentioned by Kai-Lan inDragonboat Festival, then inThe Moon Festivalwhere he helps cook the mooncakes. He appears again inLulu's Cloud, where they ride on him.

characters.name: Mr. Fluffy and Mei Mei
characters.actor_name: Mr. Fluffy:Austin Chan (S1E2, 6)Jeremy Herzig (S1E3, 14)Elan Garfias (S2 onwards)Charlie Povey (UK)Mei Mei:Laura Marano (S1E2)Brittany Chen (S1E6 onwards)Isabella Vivian (UK)
characters.description: Mr. Fluffy and Mei MeiSpeciesMr. Fluffy (hamster)Mei Mei (polar bear)First AppearanceDragonboat FestivalEverybody's Hat Parade(speaking appearance)ActorMr. Fluffy:Austin Chan (S1E2, 6)Jeremy Herzig (S1E3, 14)Elan Garfias (S2 onwards)Charlie Povey (UK)Mei Mei:Laura Marano (S1E2)Brittany Chen (S1E6 onwards)Isabella Vivian (UK) Mr. FluffyandMei Meiare a minor character duo appearing inNi Hao, Kai-Lan. Mr. Fluffyis a perky hamster who runs his own bakery. He makes the best cakes and pastries for any occasion. Mr. Fluffy is assisted by a shy, timid and pretty polar bear namedMei Mei. He is a brown hamster who often times wears a chef's hat and apron.

characters.name: Mr. Sun
characters.description: Mr. SunGenderMaleSpeciesSunFirst AppearanceDragonboat Festival  Mr Sun ("太阳") is one of the main characters on the show. He is yellow and round, and has a face. In the beginning of nearly every episode, he is found sleeping.Kai-Lan(or her friends), with help from the viewers, tickle him in order to wake him. After that, he sometimes lets out miniature versions of himself, which are known as "sun fuzzies" and they tickleKai-Lanand her friends. In some episodes, he is found doing several things, (e.g. playing a trumpet, wearing earmuffs and wearing a garden hat).

characters.name: Pandy
characters.description: PandyTolee's panda plush.SpeciesPandaGenderMaleFirst appearanceKai-Lan's Campout Pandyis a stuffed panda thatToleecarries around with him. Tolee is a good friend to him and doesn't want to be away from him. But the unfortunate happens inPandy's Puddlewhere he falls in a mud puddle and has to be washed, making Tolee cry a lot! Pandy's first appearance wasKai-Lan's Campoutand his last was inPandy's Puddle.

characters.name: Shu
characters.description: Shuis a minor character inNi Hao, Kai-Lan. Shu appeared inTolee’s Promise. In the beginning ofthat episode, Shu along with his other snail friends was really excited for the new merry go round to open. However, the merry go round then broke which caused him to cry. Kai-Lanthen comforted him telling him that a new merry go round will be built. This made him feel better.

characters.name: The Ants
characters.description: The Ants ("蚂蚁") are really nice, small red ants that like to build, as well as do other activities. They were introduced in the episodeTwirly Whirly FlyerswhereToleeaccidentally breaks their bridge. All of the ants live in a small city called ant city, which is in Kai-Lan's backyard. characters.description: The snails(蜗牛) are nice, colorful little snails inNi Hao, Kai Lan. They can be various ages, as seen inTolee's Promise. The each have a main color, with three spots of darker colors on their shells, with a light underbelly.
